title: Cheatin' Heart Scanner — Who Ya Lookin' For?

email.title: Email Address
email.description: Their email address. The one they use for all their 'newsletters'. E.g. johnno@bigpond.com

username.title: Username/Handle
username.description: Their online handle. Could be their gamertag, Insta handle, or whatever they call themselves when they think nobody's watchin'.

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.description: Aussie mobile in E.164 format, e.g. +614****5678. The number they 'forgot' to tell you about.

fullName.title: Full Name
fullName.description: Their full name (optional but helps narrow the mongrel down). E.g. John Smith.

platforms.title: Sites to Snoop
platforms.description: Pick which platforms to check. Leave empty to check 'em all. Don't be shy.

state.title: Aussie State
state.description: Narrows results to local AU sites. Pick your state, skip the interstate drama.
